export * from './ExpoAudio';
export type * from './Audio.types';
export type * from './AudioModule.types';
export * from './AudioConstants';
export * from './RecordingConstants';

--BEGIN AGENT OBSERVATION--
import { PermissionResponse } from 'expo-modules-core';
import { AudioMode, AudioPlayerOptions, AudioSource, AudioStatus, RecorderState, RecordingOptions, RecordingStatus } from './Audio.types';
import AudioModule from './AudioModule';
import { AudioPlayer, AudioRecorder, AudioSample } from './AudioModule.types';
/**
 * Creates an `AudioPlayer` instance that automatically releases when the component unmounts.
 *
 * This hook manages the player's lifecycle and ensures it's properly disposed when no longer needed.
 * The player will start loading the audio source immediately upon creation.
 *
 * @param source The audio source to load. Can be a local asset via `require()`, a remote URL, or null for no initial source.
 * @param options Audio player configuration options.
 * @returns An `AudioPlayer` instance that's automatically managed by the component lifecycle.
 *
 * @example
 * ```tsx
 * import { useAudioPlayer } from 'expo-audio';
 *
 * function MyComponent() {
 *   const player = useAudioPlayer(require('./sound.mp3'));
 *
 *   return (
 *     <Button title="Play" onPress={() => player.play()} />
 *   );
 * }
 * ```
 *
 * @example Using downloadFirst
 * ```tsx
 * import { useAudioPlayer } from 'expo-audio';
 *
 * function MyComponent() {
 *   const player = useAudioPlayer('https://example.com/audio.mp3', {
 *     updateInterval: 1000,
 *     downloadFirst: true,
 *   });
 *
 *   return (
 *     <Button title="Play" onPress={() => player.play()} />
 *   );
 * }
 * ```
 */
export declare function useAudioPlayer(source?: AudioSource, options?: AudioPlayerOptions): AudioPlayer;
/**
 * Hook that provides real-time playback status updates for an `AudioPlayer`.
 *
 * This hook automatically subscribes to playback status changes and returns the current status.
 * The status includes information about playback state, current time, duration, loading state, and more.
 *
 * @param player The `AudioPlayer` instance to monitor.
 * @returns The current `AudioStatus` object containing playback information.
 *
 * @example
 * ```tsx
 * import { useAudioPlayer, useAudioPlayerStatus } from 'expo-audio';
 *
 * function PlayerComponent() {
 *   const player = useAudioPlayer(require('./sound.mp3'));
 *   const status = useAudioPlayerStatus(player);
 *
 *   return (
 *     <View>
 *       <Text>Playing: {status.playing ? 'Yes' : 'No'}</Text>
 *       <Text>Current Time: {status.currentTime}s</Text>
 *       <Text>Duration: {status.duration}s</Text>
 *     </View>
 *   );
 * }
 * ```
 */
export declare function useAudioPlayerStatus(player: AudioPlayer): AudioStatus;
/**
 * Hook that sets up audio sampling for an `AudioPlayer` and calls a listener with audio data.
 *
 * This hook enables audio sampling on the player (if supported) and subscribes to audio sample updates.
 * Audio sampling provides real-time access to audio waveform data for visualization or analysis.
 *
 * > **Note:** Audio sampling requires `RECORD_AUDIO` permission on Android and is not supported on all platforms.
 *
[The command completed with exit code 0.]
[Current working directory: /workspace/app-c6jsx92bbkld]
--END AGENT OBSERVATION--

27:     * Boolean value indicating whether the player is currently playing.
29:    playing: boolean;
57:    currentTime: number;
59:     * The total duration of the audio in seconds.
61:    duration: number;
125:     * Start playing audio.
127:    play(): void;
131:    pause(): void;
175:     * This will clear the lock screen's now playing info.
231:    currentTime: number;
252:    pause(): void;

<action>
**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-c6jsx92bbkld/src/app/(app)/pronunciacion.tsx]
Thought: Good, expo-audio was auto-added to plugins. Now create the Pronunciación screen:
Command: create
Created File with Text:
```
import { useCallback, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import { Animated, Pressable, ScrollView, Text, View } from 'react-native';
import { SafeAreaView } from 'react-native-safe-area-context';
import { useAudioPlayer, useAudioPlayerStatus } from 'expo-audio';
import { useRouter } from 'expo-router';

/* ─── Datos de palabras con sus archivos de audio ─── */
const PALABRAS = [
  {
    id: 'aau',
    karina: 'Aau',
    espanol: 'Sí / Afirmación',
    descripcion: 'Palabra de afirmación usada por el pueblo Kariña para decir "sí" o para confirmar algo.',
    emoji: '✅',
    color: '#2E7D32',
    audio: require('../../../../../assets/sounds/aau.mpeg'),
    silabas: 'A - au',
    tip: 'Pronuncia la "a" abierta y la "u" suave al final.',
  },
  {
    id: 'mojko',
    karina: 'Mojko',
    espanol: 'Pájaro',
    descripcion: 'Palabra Kariña para referirse a las aves. Los pájaros son importantes en la cosmovisión Kariña.',
    emoji: '🐦',
    color: '#1565C0',
    audio: require('../../../../../assets/sounds/mojko.mpeg'),
    silabas: 'Moj - ko',
    tip: 'La "j" tiene un sonido suave, casi como una "y" en español.',
  },
  {
    id: 'nana',
    karina: "Na'na",
    espanol: 'Abuela / Madre',
    descripcion: "En Kariña, 'Na'na' es un término de cariño para referirse a la abuela o a la madre.",
    emoji: '👵',
    color: '#BF360C',
    audio: require('../../../../../assets/sounds/nana.mpeg'),
    silabas: "Na' - na",
    tip: "El apóstrofe indica una pausa glotal breve entre las dos sílabas.",
  },
  {
    id: 'nakon',
    karina: "Na'nakon",
    espanol: 'Nuestro camino / Nuestro sendero',
    descripcion: "Palabra que describe el camino o sendero compartido. Representa la unidad del pueblo Kariña.",
    emoji: '🌿',
    color: '#E65100',
    audio: require('../../../../../assets/sounds/nakon.mpeg'),
    silabas: "Na' - na - kon",
    tip: 'Pronuncia cada sílaba de forma clara y pausada.',
  },
];

/* ─── Componente de cada tarjeta de pronunciación ─── */
function PalabraCard({ item, isActive, onPlay }: {
  item: typeof PALABRAS[0];
  isActive: boolean;
  onPlay: () => void;
}) {
  const scale = useRef(new Animated.Value(1)).current;
  const player = useAudioPlayer(item.audio);
  const status = useAudioPlayerStatus(player);
  const isPlaying = status.playing;

  const handlePlay = () => {
    if (isPlaying) {
      player.pause();
    } else {
      player.seekTo(0);
      player.play();
      onPlay();
    }
  };

  const handlePressIn = () =>
    Animated.spring(scale, { toValue: 0.97, useNativeDriver: true }).start();
  const handlePressOut = () =>
    Animated.spring(scale, { toValue: 1, useNativeDriver: true }).start();

  return (
    <Pressable onPress={handlePlay} onPressIn={handlePressIn} onPressOut={handlePressOut}>
      <Animated.View style={{ transform: [{ scale }], marginBottom: 16 }}>
        <View
          style={{
            backgroundColor: '#FFFFFF',
            borderRadius: 20,
            overflow: 'hidden',
            borderWidth: isActive ? 2 : 1,
            borderColor: isActive ? item.color : '#F0EDE8',
            boxShadow: isActive
              ? `0 4px 16px ${item.color}33`
              : '0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)',
          }}
        >
          {/* Encabezado de color */}
          <View
            style={{
              backgroundColor: item.color,
              paddingHorizontal: 20,
              paddingVertical: 16,
              flexDirection: 'row',
              alignItems: 'center',
              justifyContent: 'space-between',
            }}
          >
            <View style={{ flex: 1 }}>
              <Text style={{ fontSize: 10, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.75)', fontWeight: '700', letterSpacing: 1 }}>
                KARIÑA
              </Text>
              <Text style={{ fontSize: 28, fontWeight: '900', color: '#FFFFFF', marginTop: 2 }}>
                {item.karina}
              </Text>
              <Text style={{ fontSize: 13, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.85)', marginTop: 2 }}>
                {item.espanol}
              </Text>
            </View>
            {/* Botón de reproducción */}
            <View
              style={{
                width: 56,
                height: 56,
                borderRadius: 28,
                backgroundColor: isPlaying ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.95)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.25)',
                alignItems: 'center',
                justifyContent: 'center',
                borderWidth: 2,
                borderColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.6)',
              }}
            >
              <Text style={{ fontSize: 24, color: isPlaying ? item.color : '#FFFFFF' }}>
                {isPlaying ? '⏸' : '▶️'}
              </Text>
            </View>
          </View>

          {/* Cuerpo de la tarjeta */}
          <View style={{ padding: 16 }}>
            {/* Sílabas */}
            <View style={{ flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8, marginBottom: 10 }}>
              <Text style={{ fontSize: 10, fontWeight: '700', color: '#888', letterSpacing: 1 }}>
                SÍLABAS:
              </Text>
              <View
                style={{
                  backgroundColor: `${item.color}18`,
                  borderRadius: 8,
                  paddingHorizontal: 10,
                  paddingVertical: 4,
                }}
              >
                <Text style={{ fontSize: 14, fontWeight: '800', color: item.color, letterSpacing: 2 }}>
                  {item.silabas}
                </Text>
              </View>
            </View>

            {/* Descripción */}
            <Text style={{ fontSize: 12, color: '#555', lineHeight: 18, marginBottom: 10 }}>
              {item.descripcion}
            </Text>

            {/* Consejo de pronunciación */}
            <View
              style={{
                backgroundColor: '#FFF8E7',
                borderRadius: 12,
                padding: 12,
                flexDirection: 'row',
                alignItems: 'flex-start',
                gap: 8,
                borderLeftWidth: 3,
                borderLeftColor: '#F59E0B',
              }}
            >
              <Text style={{ fontSize: 16 }}>💡</Text>
              <View style={{ flex: 1 }}>
                <Text style={{ fontSize: 10, fontWeight: '700', color: '#F59E0B', marginBottom: 3 }}>
                  CONSEJO DE PRONUNCIACIÓN
                </Text>
                <Text style={{ fontSize: 12, color: '#666', lineHeight: 16 }}>
                  {item.tip}
                </Text>
              </View>
            </View>

            {/* Barra de progreso de reproducción */}
            {isPlaying && (
              <View style={{ marginTop: 12 }}>
                <View
                  style={{
                    height: 4,
                    backgroundColor: '#E8F5E9',
                    borderRadius: 4,
                    overflow: 'hidden',
                  }}
                >
                  <View
                    style={{
                      height: '100%',
                      backgroundColor: item.color,
                      borderRadius: 4,
                      width:
                        status.duration > 0
                          ? `${(status.currentTime / status.duration) * 100}%`
                          : '0%',
                    }}
                  />
                </View>
                <Text style={{ fontSize: 10, color: '#888', marginTop: 4, textAlign: 'right' }}>
                  {Math.floor(status.currentTime)}s /{' '}
                  {status.duration > 0 ? Math.floor(status.duration) : '?'}s
                </Text>
              </View>
            )}

            {/* Indicador de "Toca para escuchar" cuando está inactivo */}
            {!isPlaying && (
              <View style={{ flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'center', gap: 6, marginTop: 10 }}>
                <Text style={{ fontSize: 14 }}>{item.emoji}</Text>
                <Text style={{ fontSize: 11, color: item.color, fontWeight: '600' }}>
                  Toca para escuchar la pronunciación
                </Text>
              </View>
            )}
          </View>
        </View>
      </Animated.View>
    </Pressable>
  );
}

/* ─── Pantalla principal de Pronunciación ─── */
export default function PronunciacionScreen() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [activeId, setActiveId] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const handlePlay = useCallback((id: string) => {
    setActiveId(id);
  }, []);

  return (
    <SafeAreaView style={{ flex: 1, backgroundColor: '#F9F6F0' }} edges={['top']}>
      {/* Header */}
      <View
        style={{
          backgroundColor: '#1B5E20',
          paddingHorizontal: 20,
          paddingTop: 6,
          paddingBottom: 20,
        }}
      >
        {/* Botón volver */}
        <Pressable
          onPress={() => router.back()}
          style={{ marginBottom: 12, alignSelf: 'flex-start' }}
        >
          <View
            style={{
              flexDirection: 'row',
              alignItems: 'center',
              gap: 6,
              backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)',
              borderRadius: 20,
              paddingHorizontal: 12,
              paddingVertical: 6,
            }}
          >
            <Text style={{ color: '#FFFFFF', fontSize: 16 }}>←</Text>
            <Text style={{ color: '#FFFFFF', fontSize: 13, fontWeight: '600' }}>
              Módulos
            </Text>
          </View>
        </Pressable>

        <View style={{ flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'center', gap: 10 }}>
          <Text style={{ fontSize: 32 }}>🗣️</Text>
          <View>
            <Text style={{ color: '#F59E0B', fontSize: 11, fontWeight: '700' }}>
              KARIÑA · NÏWONPÏ
            </Text>
            <Text style={{ color: '#FFFFFF', fontSize: 22, fontWeight: '900' }}>
              Pronunciación
            </Text>
            <Text style={{ color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.75)', fontSize: 12 }}>
              {PALABRAS.length} palabras con audio real
            </Text>
          </View>
        </View>

        {/* Indicación de uso */}
        <View
          style={{
            backgroundColor: 'rgba(245,158,11,0.2)',
            borderRadius: 12,
            padding: 12,
            marginTop: 14,
            flexDirection: 'row',
            alignItems: 'center',
            gap: 8,
          }}
        >
          <Text style={{ fontSize: 18 }}>🎧</Text>
          <Text style={{ color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.9)', fontSize: 12, flex: 1 }}>
            Toca cada tarjeta para escuchar la pronunciación auténtica en idioma Kariña
          </Text>
        </View>
      </View>

      <ScrollView
        contentContainerStyle={{ padding: 20, paddingBottom: 30 }}
        showsVerticalScrollIndicator={false}
      >
        {/* Contador de palabras */}
        <View
          style={{
            flexDirection: 'row',
            justifyContent: 'space-between',
            alignItems: 'center',
            marginBottom: 18,
          }}
        >
          <Text style={{ fontSize: 14, fontWeight: '700', color: '#1A2E1A' }}>
            Palabras Kariña con Audio
          </Text>
          <View
            style={{
              backgroundColor: '#E8F5E9',
              borderRadius: 12,
              paddingHorizontal: 12,
              paddingVertical: 5,
            }}
          >
            <Text style={{ fontSize: 11, color: '#2E7D32', fontWeight: '700' }}>
              {PALABRAS.length} palabras
            </Text>
          </View>
        </View>

        {/* Tarjetas de palabras */}
        {PALABRAS.map((item) => (
          <PalabraCard
            key={item.id}
            item={item}
            isActive={activeId === item.id}
            onPlay={() => handlePlay(item.id)}
          />
        ))}

        {/* Nota cultural */}
        <View
          style={{
            backgroundColor: '#1B5E20',
            borderRadius: 16,
            padding: 16,
            marginTop: 8,
            flexDirection: 'row',
            gap: 12,
            alignItems: 'flex-start',
          }}
        >
          <Text style={{ fontSize: 28 }}>🪶</Text>
          <View style={{ flex: 1 }}>
            <Text style={{ color: '#F59E0B', fontSize: 12, fontWeight: '800', marginBottom: 4 }}>
              Sobre el idioma Kariña
            </Text>
            <Text style={{ color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.85)', fontSize: 12, lineHeight: 18 }}>
              El Kariña es una lengua caribe hablada en el Estado Bolívar, Venezuela.
              Cada palabra lleva consigo siglos de historia y sabiduría del pueblo Kariña.
            </Text>
          </View>
        </View>
      </ScrollView>
    </SafeAreaView>
  );
}

```

</action>
<observation>

    77 function ModuloItem({ item }: { item: (typeof MODULOS)[0] }) {
    78   const scale = useRef(new Animated.Value(1)).current;
    79 
    80   return (
    81     <Pressable
    82       onPress={() => {}}
    83       onPressIn={() =>
    84         Animated.spring(scale, { toValue: 0.97, useNativeDriver: true }).start()
    85       }
    86       onPressOut={() =>
    87         Animated.spring(scale, { toValue: 1, useNativeDriver: true }).start()
    88       }

    90       <Animated.View style={{ transform: [{ scale }], marginBottom: 14 }}>

**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-c6jsx92bbkld/src/app/(app)/(tabs)/modulos.tsx]
Thought: Now I have full context. Let me rewrite the ModuloItem component to include navigation and audio badge:
Command: str_replace
Old String: ```
function ModuloItem({ item }: { item: (typeof MODULOS)[0] }) {
  const scale = useRef(new Animated.Value(1)).current;

  return (
    <Pressable
      onPress={() => {}}
      onPressIn={() =>
        Animated.spring(scale, { toValue: 0.97, useNativeDriver: true }).start()
      }
      onPressOut={() =>
        Animated.spring(scale, { toValue: 1, useNativeDriver: true }).start()
      }
    >
      <Animated.View style={{ transform: [{ scale }], marginBottom: 14 }}>
        <View
          style={{
            backgroundColor: '#FFFFFF',
            borderRadius: 16,
            overflow: 'hidden',
            flexDirection: 'row',
            boxShadow: '0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)',
            borderWidth: 1,
            borderColor: '#F0EDE8',
          }}
        >
          <Image
            source={{ uri: item.imagen }}
            style={{ width: 90, height: 100 }}
            contentFit="cover"
          />
          <View style={{ flex: 1, padding: 12, justifyContent: 'space-between' }}>
            <View>
              <View style={{ flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'center', gap: 6 }}>
                <Text style={{ fontSize: 18 }}>{item.icono}</Text>
                <Text
                  style={{ fontSize: 14, fontWeight: '800', color: '#1A2E1A' }}
                >
                  {item.titulo}
                </Text>
              </View>
              <Text
                style={{
                  fontSize: 10,
                  color: item.color,
                  fontWeight: '700',
                  marginTop: 1,
                  marginBottom: 4,
                }}
              >
                {item.karina}
              </Text>
              <Text style={{ fontSize: 11, color: '#666', lineHeight: 15 }}>
                {item.descripcion}
              </Text>
            </View>
            <View
              style={{
                flexDirection: 'row',
                justifyContent: 'space-between',
                alignItems: 'center',
                marginTop: 8,
              }}
            >
              <Text style={{ fontSize: 10, color: '#888' }}>
                {item.lecciones} lecciones
              </Text>
              <View
                style={{
                  backgroundColor: item.color,
                  borderRadius: 10,
                  paddingHorizontal: 10,
                  paddingVertical: 4,
                }}
              >
                <Text style={{ color: '#FFF', fontSize: 10, fontWeight: '700' }}>
                  Iniciar
                </Text>
              </View>
            </View>
          </View>
        </View>
      </Animated.View>
    </Pressable>
  );
}
```
New String: ```
function ModuloItem({ item }: { item: (typeof MODULOS)[0] }) {
  const scale = useRef(new Animated.Value(1)).current;
  const router = useRouter();
  const hasRoute = 'route' in item && Boolean(item.route);

  const handlePress = () => {
    if (hasRoute) {
      router.push(item.route as '/(app)/pronunciacion');
    }
  };

  return (
    <Pressable
      onPress={handlePress}
      onPressIn={() =>
        Animated.spring(scale, { toValue: 0.97, useNativeDriver: true }).start()
      }
      onPressOut={() =>
        Animated.spring(scale, { toValue: 1, useNativeDriver: true }).start()
      }
    >
      <Animated.View style={{ transform: [{ scale }], marginBottom: 14 }}>
        <View
          style={{
            backgroundColor: '#FFFFFF',
            borderRadius: 16,
            overflow: 'hidden',
            flexDirection: 'row',
            boxShadow: hasRoute
              ? `0 2px 10px ${item.color}33`
              : '0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)',
            borderWidth: hasRoute ? 2 : 1,
            borderColor: hasRoute ? item.color : '#F0EDE8',
          }}
        >
          <Image
            source={{ uri: item.imagen }}
            style={{ width: 90, height: 100 }}
            contentFit="cover"
          />
          <View style={{ flex: 1, padding: 12, justifyContent: 'space-between' }}>
            <View>
              <View style={{ flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'center', gap: 6 }}>
                <Text style={{ fontSize: 18 }}>{item.icono}</Text>
                <Text style={{ fontSize: 14, fontWeight: '800', color: '#1A2E1A' }}>
                  {item.titulo}
                </Text>
                {/* Badge de audio disponible */}
                {hasRoute && (
                  <View
                    style={{
                      backgroundColor: '#E3F2FD',
                      borderRadius: 8,
                      paddingHorizontal: 6,
                      paddingVertical: 2,
                    }}
                  >
                    <Text style={{ fontSize: 9, fontWeight: '800', color: item.color }}>
                      🎧 AUDIO
                    </Text>
                  </View>
                )}
              </View>
              <Text
                style={{
                  fontSize: 10,
                  color: item.color,
                  fontWeight: '700',
                  marginTop: 1,
                  marginBottom: 4,
                }}
              >
                {item.karina}
              </Text>
              <Text style={{ fontSize: 11, color: '#666', lineHeight: 15 }}>
                {item.descripcion}
              </Text>
            </View>
            <View
              style={{
                flexDirection: 'row',
                justifyContent: 'space-between',
                alignItems: 'center',
                marginTop: 8,
              }}
            >
              <Text style={{ fontSize: 10, color: '#888' }}>
                {item.lecciones} lecciones
              </Text>
              <View
                style={{
                  backgroundColor: item.color,
                  borderRadius: 10,
                  paddingHorizontal: 10,
                  paddingVertical: 4,
                }}
              >
                <Text style={{ color: '#FFF', fontSize: 10, fontWeight: '700' }}>
                  {hasRoute ? 'Escuchar →' : 'Iniciar'}
                </Text>
              </View>
            </View>
          </View>
        </View>
      </Animated.View>
    </Pressable>
  );
}
```

</action>

--BEGIN AGENT OBSERVATION--

> expo-template@1.0.0 lint /workspace/app-c6jsx92bbkld

    :            ^^^^^^^

  x eslint(no-undef): 'require' is not defined.
    ,-[src/app/(app)/pronunciacion.tsx:38:12]

 38 |     audio: require('../../../../../assets/sounds/nana.mpeg'),
    :            ^^^^^^^

    `----

  x eslint(no-undef): 'require' is not defined.
    ,-[src/app/(app)/pronunciacion.tsx:49:12]

 49 |     audio: require('../../../../../assets/sounds/nakon.mpeg'),
    :            ^^^^^^^

Found 0 warnings and 4 errors.
Finished in 500ms on 17 files with 26 rules using 4 threads.
Checked 50 files in 1314ms. No fixes applied.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
RESULT: FAILED — Found errors in: oxlint
Fix all errors above, then re-run 'npm run lint'.

[The command completed with exit code 1.]
[Current working directory: /workspace/app-c6jsx92bbkld]
--END AGENT OBSERVATION--
</observation>
<action>
AgentThinkAction(thought="The lint rule says `require` is not defined. In an ESLint config for this project, `require` is not listed as a global. I need to either:\n1. Add `require` to globals in the eslint config\n2. Use a different approach - import the audio files at the top of the file instead of using `require()` inline\n\nThe cleanest fix is to import the audio files at the top of the file:\n```typescript\nconst aauAudio = require('../../../../../assets/sounds/aau.mpeg');\n```\n\nBut that still uses `require`. Better to check how to use import for static assets in Expo.\n\nActually in Expo/React Native, audio assets are loaded with `require()`. The issue is the eslint rule flagging it. \n\nThe best fix is to use `import` statements instead of `require()`:\n```typescript\nimport aauAudio from '../../../../../assets/sounds/aau.mpeg';\n```\n\nWait, but TypeScript doesn't know the type for .mpeg files by default. I could use:\n```typescript\n// @ts-expect-error audio asset\nimport aauAudio from '../../../../../assets/sounds/aau.mpeg';\n```\n\nOr declare a module type.\n\nActually the easiest fix that follows Expo best practices is to use `require()` but we need to declare it as a global. Looking at the biome.json or oxlint config...\n\nLet me check what globals config is available:\n", action=<ActionType.THINK: 'think'>)
</action>
<observation>
AgentThinkObservation(content='Your thought has been logged.', observation=<ObservationType.THINK: 'think'>)
</observation>

<action>
AgentThinkAction(thought="The lint is using `devkit-lint` which runs oxlint + biome + tsc. The `require` is not defined error comes from oxlint's `no-undef` rule (ESLint compatibility). \n\nThe best solution is to avoid `require()` altogether and use typed imports. For audio assets in Expo, I can declare module types for `.mpeg` files in the nativewind-env.d.ts or a separate type declaration file, then use ES6 import syntax.\n\nLet me add a type declaration for .mpeg files and use `import` statements instead of `require()`.\n\nIn nativewind-env.d.ts or a new type file, add:\n```typescript\ndeclare module '*.mpeg' {\n  const resource: number;\n  export default resource;\n}\n```\n\nThen in pronunciacion.tsx use:\n```typescript\nimport aauAudio from '../../../../../assets/sounds/aau.mpeg';\n```\n\nThis is cleaner and avoids the `require` issue.\n", action=<ActionType.THINK: 'think'>)
</action>
<observation>
AgentThinkObservation(content='Your thought has been logged.', observation=<ObservationType.THINK: 'think'>)
</observation>
<action>

</action>

  },

     2 import { Stack } from 'expo-router';
     3 import { PortalHost } from '@rn-primitives/portal';

     6 
     7 import '../global.css';
     8

    10   dsn: process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN,
    11 });
    12 
    13 const RootLayout: React.FC = () => {
    14   return (
    15     <GestureHandlerRootView style={{ flex: 1 }}>
    16       <StatusBar style="light" backgroundColor="#1B5E20" />
    17       <Stack screenOptions={{ headerShown: false }}>

    20       </Stack>

import { Redirect } from 'expo-router';

export default function Index() {

}

**CmdRunAction (source=EventSource.AGENT, is_input=False)**
THOUGHT: El problema es que tanto `src/app/index.tsx` como `src/app/(app)/(tabs)/index.tsx` compiten por la ruta `/`. La solución correcta es **eliminar el root `index.tsx`** y quitar su referencia en el root layout, dejando que el grupo `(app)` maneje la entrada:
COMMAND:
rm /workspace/app-c6jsx92bbkld/src/app/index.tsx
</action>

AgentFinishAction(final_thought='# Summary\n\nLint pasa perfecto. El problema era que existía una **ruta duplicada**: tanto `src/app/index.tsx` como `src/app/(app)/(tabs)/index.tsx` competían por la URL `/`, lo que hacía que expo-router no supiera qué renderizar y mostraba pantalla en blanco.\n\nLa solución aplicada:\n1. **Eliminé** `src/app/index.tsx` (ruta duplicada)\n2. **Actualicé** `src/app/_layout.tsx` para que solo tenga `<Stack.Screen name="(app)" />` como entrada\n\nAhora el flujo de navegación es:\n- `/` → entra directo al grupo `(app)` → Stack renderiza `(tabs)` → Tabs muestra la pantalla de **Inicio**\n\nLa app debería cargar correctamente ahora. ¿Podrías probar y confirmarme si ya se ve?', commit_message='# Issue\n\nEliminar ruta duplicada en expo-router y corregir navegación', task_completed='true', outputs={'status': 'success', 'behavior': 'code_tool', 'suggested_questions': [{'title': 'Probar navegación', 'query': 'Probar la aplicación y confirmar que carga correctamente'}, {'title': 'Revisar rutas', 'query': 'Revisar la estructura de rutas en src/app para evitar duplicados'}, {'title': 'Agregar pantallas', 'query': 'Agregar nuevas pantallas al grupo (tabs)'}], 'type': 'standard_script', 'finish_type': 'end_code', 'button_actions': [{'type': 'button', 'event': {'args': {'versionId': 'app_version-c6klhg24cef4', 'versionDesc': 'Eliminar ruta duplicada en expo-router y corregir navegación', 'versionLabel': 'v4'}, 'name': 'rollback'}, 'label': 'Restore', 'value': 'Restore'}], 'app_id': 'app-c6jsx92bbkld', 'version_id': 'app_version-c6klhg24cef4', 'user_id': 'user-c6js8p49d4ao'}, thought='', action=<ActionType.FINISH: 'finish'>)

<action>
**CmdRunAction (source=EventSource.AGENT, is_input=False)**
THOUGHT: El problema más probable es que Metro (el bundler de Expo) **no reconoce la extensión `.mpeg`** como un asset de audio válido e intenta parsear el archivo binario como JavaScript, lo que provoca un crash silencioso y pantalla en blanco. Voy a renombrar los archivos a `.mp3` (formato estándar para audio MPEG) y actualizar todo:
COMMAND:
cd /workspace/app-c6jsx92bbkld && mv assets/sounds/aau.mpeg assets/sounds/aau.mp3 && mv assets/sounds/mojko.mpeg assets/sounds/mojko.mp3 && mv assets/sounds/nana.mpeg assets/sounds/nana.mp3 && mv assets/sounds/nakon.mpeg assets/sounds/nakon.mp3 && ls assets/sounds/
</action>
<observation>
**CmdOutputObservation (source=EventSource.AGENT, exit code=0, metadata={
  "exit_code": 0,
  "pid": -1,
  "username": null,
  "hostname": null,
  "working_dir": "/workspace/app-c6jsx92bbkld",
  "py_interpreter_path": null,
  "prefix": "",
  "suffix": "\n[The command completed with exit code 0.]"
})**
--BEGIN AGENT OBSERVATION--
aau.mp3
mojko.mp3
nakon.mp3
nana.mp3
[The command completed with exit code 0.]
[Current working directory: /workspace/app-c6jsx92bbkld]
--END AGENT OBSERVATION--
</observation>
<action>
**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-c6jsx92bbkld/nativewind-env.d.ts]
Thought: 
Command: str_replace
Old String: ```
declare module '*.mpeg' {
  const resource: number;
  export default resource;
}
```
New String: ```
declare module '*.mp3' {
  const resource: number;
  export default resource;
}
declare module '*.mpeg' {
  const resource: number;
  export default resource;
}
```

</action>

The root `index.tsx` was removed because it was a duplicate route with `(tabs)/index.tsx`\n4. Console logs show no events - either app hasn\'t run or crashed before logging\n\nMost likely causes of a blank screen:\n1. Router doesn\'t have a clear entry point without root `index.tsx` - the Stack in root layout has only `(app)` but maybe Expo Router needs explicit initialRouteName\n2. `expo-audio` might have Web compatibility issues causing the bundle to fail\n3. The pronunciacion screen imports might cause bundling issues even though it\'s not the initial route\n\nLet me try:\n1. Add explicit `initialRouteName="(tabs)"` to the (app) Stack layout\n2. Make pronunciacion.tsx safer by NOT importing expo-audio at the top level - instead use it only when needed or make it completely safe\n3. If that doesn\'t work, temporarily remove pronunciacion from the (app) layout to isolate the issue\n\nActually the most critical fix is ensuring the router knows where to start. Let me add `initialRouteName` to both Stacks.\n', action=<ActionType.THINK: 'think'>)

     3 import { PortalHost } from '@rn-primitives/portal';
     4 import { GestureHandlerRootView } from 'react-native-gesture-handler';
     5 import { StatusBar } from 'expo-status-bar';
     6 
     7 import '../global.css';
     8 
     9 Sentry.init({
    10   dsn: process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN,
    11 });
    12 
    13 const RootLayout: React.FC = () => {
    14   return (
    15     <GestureHandlerRootView style={{ flex: 1 }}>
    16       <StatusBar style="light" backgroundColor="#1B5E20" />
    17       <Stack screenOptions={{ headerShown: false }}>
    18         <Stack.Screen name="(app)" />
    19       </Stack>

<action>
AgentThinkAction(thought='The app shows a blank screen even after fixing the duplicate route and renaming audio files. Let me think about the most likely root causes:\n\n1. **Router initial route**: Without root `index.tsx`, the router may not know which screen to show first. Adding `initialRouteName="(tabs)"` to the (app) Stack is critical.\n\n2. **expo-audio causing crash**: The `expo-audio` import in pronunciacion.tsx might fail at module load time (even though it\'s not the initial screen, Metro bundles everything together). If `expo-audio` native module fails, the whole bundle crashes.\n\n3. **Audio asset bundling on Web**: The `.mp3` imports might fail in the Web preview environment, causing the module to throw.\n\nMy strategy:\n- Add `initialRouteName="(tabs)"` to the (app) Stack layout\n- Completely rewrite pronunciacion.tsx to NOT use `expo-audio` at the top level. Instead, create a safe implementation that only loads audio when the user taps play, and gracefully degrades if audio fails.\n- The safest approach: use React.lazy to load the audio player component, or simply don\'t use expo-audio hooks and instead use a fallback message if audio is unavailable.\n\nActually, the simplest robust approach: create a separate `AudioWordPlayer.tsx` component that lazy-loads expo-audio, and in the main pronunciacion screen, conditionally render it. But since React.lazy might not work perfectly in Metro, let me instead use a simpler approach:\n\nFor pronunciacion.tsx:\n- Don\'t import expo-audio at the top level\n- When user taps play, try to dynamically import expo-audio\n- If it works, create a player and play\n- If it fails, show a friendly message\n\nBut `useAudioPlayer` is a hook, can\'t be called dynamically. So I\'ll structure it differently:\n- Have a separate AudioPlayer component in its own file that uses expo-audio hooks\n- In pronunciacion.tsx, only render AudioPlayer when user taps play\n- Since AudioPlayer is in a separate file and only rendered conditionally, the expo-audio import only happens when the component mounts\n\nWait, but the separate file would still be in the same bundle. Metro doesn\'t code-split by default for `import` statements.\n\nThe safest approach for now: remove expo-audio completely from pronunciacion, show beautiful static cards with pronunciation tips, and add a note that audio playback requires the native app. This ensures the app works. Then once confirmed working, I can add audio back with a more robust implementation.\n', action=<ActionType.THINK: 'think'>)
</action>

<action>
**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-c6jsx92bbkld/src/components/AudioWordPlayer.tsx]
Thought: 
Command: create
Created File with Text:
```
import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import { Pressable, Text, View } from 'react-native';
import { useAudioPlayer, useAudioPlayerStatus } from 'expo-audio';

import aauAudio from '../../../assets/sounds/aau.mp3';
import mojkoAudio from '../../../assets/sounds/mojko.mp3';
import nanaAudio from '../../../assets/sounds/nana.mp3';
import nakonAudio from '../../../assets/sounds/nakon.mp3';

const AUDIO_MAP: Record<string, number> = {
  aau: aauAudio,
  mojko: mojkoAudio,
  nana: nanaAudio,
  nakon: nakonAudio,
};

interface AudioWordPlayerProps {
  wordId: string;
  color: string;
  onError?: (msg: string) => void;
}

export default function AudioWordPlayer({ wordId, color, onError }: AudioWordPlayerProps) {
  const audioSource = AUDIO_MAP[wordId];
  const [hasError, setHasError] = useState(false);
  const player = useAudioPlayer(audioSource ?? null);
  const status = useAudioPlayerStatus(player);
  const isPlaying = status.playing;
  const progress =
    status.duration > 0 ? (status.currentTime / status.duration) * 100 : 0;

  /* Pausar al desmontar */
  const didUnmount = useRef(false);
  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      didUnmount.current = true;
      try {
        player.pause();
      } catch {
        // ignorar
      }
    };
  }, [player]);

  /* Detectar si el audio terminó y reiniciar progreso visual */
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isPlaying && status.currentTime >= status.duration && status.duration > 0) {
      try {
        player.seekTo(0);
      } catch {
        // ignorar
      }
    }
  }, [isPlaying, status.currentTime, status.duration, player]);

  if (!audioSource) {
    return (
      <Text style={{ fontSize: 12, color: '#888', marginTop: 10 }}>
        🔇 Audio no disponible para esta palabra
      </Text>
    );
  }

  if (hasError) {
    return (
      <Text style={{ fontSize: 12, color: '#888', marginTop: 10 }}>
        🔇 No se pudo reproducir el audio
      </Text>
    );
  }

  const handlePress = () => {
    try {
      if (isPlaying) {
        player.pause();
      } else {
        player.seekTo(0);
        player.play();
      }
    } catch (e) {
      setHasError(true);
      onError?.(String(e));
    }
  };

  return (
    <View style={{ marginTop: 12 }}>
      {/* Botón de reproducción */}
      <Pressable onPress={handlePress}>
        <View
          style={{
            flexDirection: 'row',
            alignItems: 'center',
            gap: 8,
            backgroundColor: `${color}18`,
            borderRadius: 10,
            paddingHorizontal: 14,
            paddingVertical: 8,
            alignSelf: 'flex-start',
          }}
        >
          <Text style={{ fontSize: 18 }}>{isPlaying ? '⏸' : '▶️'}</Text>
          <Text style={{ fontSize: 13, fontWeight: '700', color }}>
            {isPlaying ? 'Pausar' : 'Escuchar pronunciación'}
          </Text>
        </View>
      </Pressable>

      {/* Barra de progreso */}
      {isPlaying && (
        <View style={{ marginTop: 10 }}>
          <View
            style={{
              height: 4,
              backgroundColor: '#E8F5E9',
              borderRadius: 4,
              overflow: 'hidden',
            }}
          >
            <View
              style={{
                height: '100%',
                backgroundColor: color,
                borderRadius: 4,
                width: `${progress}%`,
              }}
            />
          </View>
          <Text style={{ fontSize: 10, color: '#888', marginTop: 4, textAlign: 'right' }}>
            {Math.floor(status.currentTime)}s / {Math.floor(status.duration)}s
          </Text>
        </View>
      )}
    </View>
  );
}

```

</action>
<observation>
File created successfully at: /workspace/app-c6jsx92bbkld/src/components/AudioWordPlayer.tsx

Agregar initialRouteName a los Stack layouts para definir ruta inicial *high* [completed]\n\n2. Crear componente AudioPlayer seguro con carga diferida (lazy) *high* [completed]\n\n3. Reescribir pronunciacion.tsx para usar AudioPlayer lazy y no crashear *high* [in_progress]\n\n4. Verificar lint pasa y estructura es correcta *medium* [pending]\n</system-reminder>', state=TodoState(items=[TodoItem(id='1', status='completed', priority='high', content='Agregar initialRouteName a los Stack layouts para definir ruta inicial', details='', group=None, agent_name=None), TodoItem(id='2', status='completed', priority='high', content='Crear componente AudioPlayer seguro con carga diferida (lazy)', details='', group=None, agent_name=None), TodoItem(id='3', status='in_progress', priority='high', content='Reescribir pronunciacion.tsx para usar AudioPlayer lazy y no crashear', details='', group=None, agent_name=None), TodoItem(id='4', status='pending', priority='medium', content='Verificar lint pasa y estructura es correcta', details='', group=None, agent_name=None)], updated_at='2026-06-07T19:28:33.779438+00:00'), system_reminder='', observation=<ObservationType.TODO: 'todo'>)

<action>
**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-c6jsx92bbkld/src/app/(app)/pronunciacion.tsx]
Thought: 
Command: create
Created File with Text:
```
import { useCallback, useRef, useState, Suspense, lazy } from 'react';
import { Animated, Pressable, ScrollView, Text, View } from 'react-native';
import { SafeAreaView } from 'react-native-safe-area-context';
import { useRouter } from 'expo-router';

/* Carga diferida del reproductor de audio (solo se carga cuando se necesita) */
const AudioWordPlayer = lazy(() => import('../../components/AudioWordPlayer'));

/* ─── Datos de palabras ─── */
const PALABRAS = [
  {
    id: 'aau',
    karina: 'Aau',
    espanol: 'Sí / Afirmación',
    descripcion: 'Palabra de afirmación usada por el pueblo Kariña para decir "sí" o para confirmar algo.',
    emoji: '✅',
    color: '#2E7D32',
    silabas: 'A - au',
    tip: 'Pronuncia la "a" abierta y la "u" suave al final.',
  },
  {
    id: 'mojko',
    karina: 'Mojko',
    espanol: 'Pájaro',
    descripcion: 'Palabra Kariña para referirse a las aves. Los pájaros son importantes en la cosmovisión Kariña.',
    emoji: '🐦',
    color: '#1565C0',
    silabas: 'Moj - ko',
    tip: 'La "j" tiene un sonido suave, casi como una "y" en español.',
  },
  {
    id: 'nana',
    karina: "Na'na",
    espanol: 'Abuela / Madre',
    descripcion: "En Kariña, 'Na'na' es un término de cariño para referirse a la abuela o a la madre.",
    emoji: '👵',
    color: '#BF360C',
    silabas: "Na' - na",
    tip: "El apóstrofe indica una pausa glotal breve entre las dos sílabas.",
  },
  {
    id: 'nakon',
    karina: "Na'nakon",
    espanol: 'Nuestro camino / Nuestro sendero',
    descripcion: "Palabra que describe el camino o sendero compartido. Representa la unidad del pueblo Kariña.",
    emoji: '🌿',
    color: '#E65100',
    silabas: "Na' - na - kon",
    tip: 'Pronuncia cada sílaba de forma clara y pausada.',
  },
];

/* ─── Tarjeta de cada palabra ─── */
function PalabraCard({
  item,
  isActive,
  onPlay,
}: {
  item: (typeof PALABRAS)[0];
  isActive: boolean;
  onPlay: () => void;
}) {
  const scale = useRef(new Animated.Value(1)).current;
  const [showAudio, setShowAudio] = useState(false);

  const handlePress = () => {
    if (!showAudio) {
      setShowAudio(true);
      onPlay();
    }
  };

  const handlePressIn = () =>
    Animated.spring(scale, { toValue: 0.97, useNativeDriver: true }).start();
  const handlePressOut = () =>
    Animated.spring(scale, { toValue: 1, useNativeDriver: true }).start();

  return (
    <Pressable
      onPress={handlePress}
      onPressIn={handlePressIn}
      onPressOut={handlePressOut}
    >
      <Animated.View style={{ transform: [{ scale }], marginBottom: 16 }}>
        <View
          style={{
            backgroundColor: '#FFFFFF',
            borderRadius: 20,
            overflow: 'hidden',
            borderWidth: isActive ? 2 : 1,
            borderColor: isActive ? item.color : '#F0EDE8',
            boxShadow: isActive
              ? `0 4px 16px ${item.color}33`
              : '0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)',
          }}
        >
          {/* Encabezado de color */}
          <View
            style={{
              backgroundColor: item.color,
              paddingHorizontal: 20,
              paddingVertical: 16,
              flexDirection: 'row',
              alignItems: 'center',
              justifyContent: 'space-between',
            }}
          >
            <View style={{ flex: 1 }}>
              <Text
                style={{
                  fontSize: 10,
                  color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.75)',
                  fontWeight: '700',
                  letterSpacing: 1,
                }}
              >
                KARIÑA
              </Text>
              <Text
                style={{ fontSize: 28, fontWeight: '900', color: '#FFFFFF', marginTop: 2 }}
              >
                {item.karina}
              </Text>
              <Text style={{ fontSize: 13, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.85)', marginTop: 2 }}>
                {item.espanol}
              </Text>
            </View>
            {/* Indicador visual de audio */}
            <View
              style={{
                width: 48,
                height: 48,
                borderRadius: 24,
                backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.25)',
                alignItems: 'center',
                justifyContent: 'center',
                borderWidth: 2,
                borderColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.6)',
              }}
            >
              <Text style={{ fontSize: 20 }}>{showAudio ? '🔊' : '▶️'}</Text>
            </View>
          </View>

          {/* Cuerpo de la tarjeta */}
          <View style={{ padding: 16 }}>
            {/* Sílabas */}
            <View
              style={{ flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8, marginBottom: 10 }}
            >
              <Text style={{ fontSize: 10, fontWeight: '700', color: '#888', letterSpacing: 1 }}>
                SÍLABAS:
              </Text>
              <View
                style={{
                  backgroundColor: `${item.color}18`,
                  borderRadius: 8,
                  paddingHorizontal: 10,
                  paddingVertical: 4,
                }}
              >
                <Text
                  style={{ fontSize: 14, fontWeight: '800', color: item.color, letterSpacing: 2 }}
                >
                  {item.silabas}
                </Text>
              </View>
            </View>

            {/* Descripción */}
            <Text style={{ fontSize: 12, color: '#555', lineHeight: 18, marginBottom: 10 }}>
              {item.descripcion}
            </Text>

            {/* Consejo de pronunciación */}
            <View
              style={{
                backgroundColor: '#FFF8E7',
                borderRadius: 12,
                padding: 12,
                flexDirection: 'row',
                alignItems: 'flex-start',
                gap: 8,
                borderLeftWidth: 3,
                borderLeftColor: '#F59E0B',
              }}
            >
              <Text style={{ fontSize: 16 }}>💡</Text>
              <View style={{ flex: 1 }}>
                <Text
                  style={{ fontSize: 10, fontWeight: '700', color: '#F59E0B', marginBottom: 3 }}
                >
                  CONSEJO DE PRONUNCIACIÓN
                </Text>
                <Text style={{ fontSize: 12, color: '#666', lineHeight: 16 }}>
                  {item.tip}
                </Text>
              </View>
            </View>

            {/* Reproductor de audio (carga diferida) */}
            {showAudio && (
              <Suspense
                fallback={
                  <View style={{ marginTop: 12, flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8 }}>
                    <View
                      style={{
                        width: 20,
                        height: 20,
                        borderRadius: 10,
                        borderWidth: 2,
                        borderColor: item.color,
                        borderTopColor: 'transparent',
                      }}
                    />
                    <Text style={{ fontSize: 12, color: item.color }}>
                      Cargando audio...
                    </Text>
                  </View>
                }
              >
                <AudioWordPlayer wordId={item.id} color={item.color} />
              </Suspense>
            )}

            {/* Indicador de "Toca para escuchar" cuando está inactivo */}
            {!showAudio && (
              <View style={{ flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'center', gap: 6, marginTop: 10 }}>
                <Text style={{ fontSize: 14 }}>{item.emoji}</Text>
                <Text style={{ fontSize: 11, color: item.color, fontWeight: '600' }}>
                  Toca para escuchar la pronunciación
                </Text>
              </View>
            )}
          </View>
        </View>
      </Animated.View>
    </Pressable>
  );
}

/* ─── Pantalla principal de Pronunciación ─── */
export default function PronunciacionScreen() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [activeId, setActiveId] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const handlePlay = useCallback((id: string) => {
    setActiveId(id);
  }, []);

  return (
    <SafeAreaView style={{ flex: 1, backgroundColor: '#F9F6F0' }} edges={['top']}>
      {/* Header */}
      <View
        style={{
          backgroundColor: '#1B5E20',
          paddingHorizontal: 20,
          paddingTop: 6,
          paddingBottom: 20,
        }}
      >
        {/* Botón volver */}
        <Pressable
          onPress={() => router.back()}
          style={{ marginBottom: 12, alignSelf: 'flex-start' }}
        >
          <View
            style={{
              flexDirection: 'row',
              alignItems: 'center',
              gap: 6,
              backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)',
              borderRadius: 20,
              paddingHorizontal: 12,
              paddingVertical: 6,
            }}
          >
            <Text style={{ color: '#FFFFFF', fontSize: 16 }}>←</Text>
            <Text style={{ color: '#FFFFFF', fontSize: 13, fontWeight: '600' }}>
              Módulos
            </Text>
          </View>
        </Pressable>

        <View style={{ flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'center', gap: 10 }}>
          <Text style={{ fontSize: 32 }}>🗣️</Text>
          <View>
            <Text style={{ color: '#F59E0B', fontSize: 11, fontWeight: '700' }}>
              KARIÑA · NÏWONPÏ
            </Text>
            <Text style={{ color: '#FFFFFF', fontSize: 22, fontWeight: '900' }}>
              Pronunciación
            </Text>
            <Text style={{ color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.75)', fontSize: 12 }}>
              {PALABRAS.length} palabras con audio real
            </Text>
          </View>
        </View>

        {/* Indicación de uso */}
        <View
          style={{
            backgroundColor: 'rgba(245,158,11,0.2)',
            borderRadius: 12,
            padding: 12,
            marginTop: 14,
            flexDirection: 'row',
            alignItems: 'center',
            gap: 8,
          }}
        >
          <Text style={{ fontSize: 18 }}>🎧</Text>
          <Text style={{ color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.9)', fontSize: 12, flex: 1 }}>
            Toca cada tarjeta para escuchar la pronunciación auténtica en idioma Kariña
          </Text>
        </View>
      </View>

      <ScrollView
        contentContainerStyle={{ padding: 20, paddingBottom: 30 }}
        showsVerticalScrollIndicator={false}
      >
        {/* Contador de palabras */}
        <View
          style={{
            flexDirection: 'row',
            justifyContent: 'space-between',
            alignItems: 'center',
            marginBottom: 18,
          }}
        >
          <Text style={{ fontSize: 14, fontWeight: '700', color: '#1A2E1A' }}>
            Palabras Kariña con Audio
          </Text>
          <View
            style={{
              backgroundColor: '#E8F5E9',
              borderRadius: 12,
              paddingHorizontal: 12,
              paddingVertical: 5,
            }}
          >
            <Text style={{ fontSize: 11, color: '#2E7D32', fontWeight: '700' }}>
              {PALABRAS.length} palabras
            </Text>
          </View>
        </View>

        {/* Tarjetas de palabras */}
        {PALABRAS.map((item) => (
          <PalabraCard
            key={item.id}
            item={item}
            isActive={activeId === item.id}
            onPlay={() => handlePlay(item.id)}
          />
        ))}

        {/* Nota cultural */}
        <View
          style={{
            backgroundColor: '#1B5E20',
            borderRadius: 16,
            padding: 16,
            marginTop: 8,
            flexDirection: 'row',
            gap: 12,
            alignItems: 'flex-start',
          }}
        >
          <Text style={{ fontSize: 28 }}>🪶</Text>
          <View style={{ flex: 1 }}>
            <Text
              style={{ color: '#F59E0B', fontSize: 12, fontWeight: '800', marginBottom: 4 }}
            >
              Sobre el idioma Kariña
            </Text>
            <Text
              style={{ color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.85)', fontSize: 12, lineHeight: 18 }}
            >
              El Kariña es una lengua caribe hablada en el Estado Bolívar, Venezuela. Cada
              palabra lleva consigo siglos de historia y sabiduría del pueblo Kariña.
            </Text>
          </View>
        </View>
      </ScrollView>
    </SafeAreaView>
  );
}

```

</action>

**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-c6jsx92bbkld/src/components/AudioWordPlayer.tsx]
Thought: El problema es la ruta: desde `src/components/AudioWordPlayer.tsx`, `../../../assets/` va un nivel más arriba del root. La ruta correcta es `../../assets/`:
Command: str_replace
Old String: ```
import aauAudio from '../../../assets/sounds/aau.mp3';
import mojkoAudio from '../../../assets/sounds/mojko.mp3';
import nanaAudio from '../../../assets/sounds/nana.mp3';
import nakonAudio from '../../../assets/sounds/nakon.mp3';
```
New String: ```
import aauAudio from '../../assets/sounds/aau.mp3';
import mojkoAudio from '../../assets/sounds/mojko.mp3';
import nanaAudio from '../../assets/sounds/nana.mp3';
import nakonAudio from '../../assets/sounds/nakon.mp3';

<observation>

NAME: get_app_detail
RESULTS: {"appCreateWay":"SOURCECODE","appDesc":"1000861193.jpg 1000861191.jpg ​[1000861193.jpg](https://agent-shared-workspace-aws-online.s3cdn.medo.dev/prod/user-c6js8p49d4ao/tmp/1000861193.jpg)​[1","appFocus":"RELEASE_FAILED","appId":"app-c6jsx92bbkld","name":"App Aprendizaje Kariña","pluginConfigs":[{"authFieldKeys":[],"isConfig":false,"isSupport":false,"pluginKey":"b17b019e-e71c-457f-93ef-619824a3e6db","pluginName":"Large language Model"}],"type":"MOBILE_APP","versionDesc":"Corregir ruta de importación de archivos de audio en el componente AudioWordPlayer","versionId":"app_version-c6kyjh76b4zk","versionLabel":"v6"}

<action>
AgentFinishAction(final_thought="# Summary\nSe corrigió el error de resolución de módulo de audio. La ruta de importación en `AudioWordPlayer.tsx` tenía un nivel de directorio de más (`../../../assets/` en lugar de `../../assets/`). Los 4 archivos de audio Kariña (Aau, Mojko, Na'na, Na'nakon) ahora se cargan correctamente desde la carpeta `assets/sounds/`.", commit_message='# Issue\nCorregir ruta de importación de archivos de audio en el componente AudioWordPlayer', task_completed='true', outputs={'status': 'success', 'behavior': 'code_tool', 'suggested_questions': [{'title': 'Más palabras audio', 'query': 'Agregar más palabras Kariña con audio al módulo de pronunciación'}, {'title': 'Grabar voz', 'query': 'Permitir que el usuario grabe su pronunciación y la compare con el audio original'}, {'title': 'Transcripción visual', 'query': 'Agregar ondas sonoras animadas mientras se reproduce el audio Kariña'}], 'type': 'standard_script', 'finish_type': 'end_code', 'button_actions': [{'type': 'button', 'event': {'args': {'versionId': 'app_version-c6kyjh76b4zk', 'versionDesc': 'Corregir ruta de importación de archivos de audio en el componente AudioWordPlayer', 'versionLabel': 'v6'}, 'name': 'rollback'}, 'label': 'Restore', 'value': 'Restore'}], 'app_id': 'app-c6jsx92bbkld', 'version_id': 'app_version-c6kyjh76b4zk', 'user_id': 'user-c6js8p49d4ao'}, thought="Lint pasa. El error era solo la ruta de importación en `AudioWordPlayer.tsx`: usaba `../../../assets/` (3 niveles arriba) cuando desde `src/components/` solo se necesitan 2 niveles (`../../assets/`) para llegar a la raíz del proyecto donde está la carpeta `assets/`.\n# Summary\nSe corrigió el error de resolución de módulo de audio. La ruta de importación en `AudioWordPlayer.tsx` tenía un nivel de directorio de más (`../../../assets/` en lugar de `../../assets/`). Los 4 archivos de audio Kariña (Aau, Mojko, Na'na, Na'nakon) ahora se cargan correctamente desde la carpeta `assets/sounds/`.\n\n# Issue\nCorregir ruta de importación de archivos de audio en el componente AudioWordPlayer\n\n# Suggested Questions\n- title: Más palabras audio; query: Agregar más palabras Kariña con audio al módulo de pronunciación\n- title: Grabar voz; query: Permitir que el usuario grabe su pronunciación y la compare con el audio original\n- title: Transcripción visual; query: Agregar ondas sonoras animadas mientras se reproduce el audio Kariña\n\nEND_CODE", action=<ActionType.FINISH: 'finish'>)
</action>
<action>
**MessageAction** (source=EventSource.USER)
CONTENT: En la primera pantalla de login, vamos a colocar la imagen de los indígenas. Luego el apartado de usuario contraseña registrarse y entrar por Google además de olvidó su contraseña. Luego se va a abrir una pantalla emergente en dado caso de que la persona quiera registrarse donde tendrá que colocar nombre apellido edad si pertenece a la comunidad indígena contraseña. Y usuario que debe generar por primera vez. Luego le va a dar continuar en la primera pantalla, vamos a tener un menú interactivo. Dónde va a tener 10 apartados que son módulos en los cuales vamos a tener cómo se pronuncian los verbos Cómo se saluda. nombre de los animales en cariña, nombre de los colores en cariña Digamos que son 10 los puedes rellenar ahí mientras le conseguimos la lógica. Luego vamos a tener las pantallas de los juegos en las primeras vamos a tener unir palabras. De cariño. a español y de español a cariño. Vamos a tener otra pantalla para escuchar audio con distintas opciones. de la A a la C Luego vamos a tener un apartado en otra pantalla de escuchar el audio y escribir lo que se escucha. Eso es todo por los momentos si tienes otra idea me lo puedes dejar Clara
</action>

</action>

<action>
AgentThinkAction(thought='El usuario quiere una reconstrucción masiva de la app con:\n\n1. **Login screen**: imagen de indígenas, usuario/contraseña, Google login, olvidó contraseña, registrarse\n2. **Modal/screen de registro**: nombre, apellido, edad, si pertenece a comunidad indígena, contraseña, usuario autogenerado\n3. **Menú interactivo con 10 módulos**:\n   - Pronunciación de verbos\n   - Saludos\n   - Animales en Kariña\n   - Colores en Kariña\n   - (6 más a rellenar)\n4. **Juegos**:\n   - Unir palabras Kariña↔Español\n   - Escuchar audio con opciones A-C\n   - Escuchar audio y escribir lo que se escucha\n\nEsto es una modificación MASIVA. Debo:\n1. Llamar a PRDAgent para actualizar el PRD\n2. Planificar con TODOs\n3. Implementar todo\n\nEl usuario ya tiene una app existente (Kariña) pero quiere prácticamente reconstruirla. Necesito pasar TODOS los requisitos al PRDAgent.\n\nMientras PRDAgent trabaja, puedo empezar a revisar la estructura actual.\n', action=<ActionType.THINK: 'think'>)
</action>

AgentThinkObservation(content='Your thought has been logged.', observation=<ObservationType.THINK: 'think'>)
</observation>
